checks.name: collection_plan_non_executing
checks.detail: Every private/context query seed and public job has execute=false.

checks.name: ontology_targets_present
checks.detail: Every query seed names at least one ontology landing target.

checks.name: secret_storage_forbidden
checks.detail: Raw password/cookie/token storage is forbidden for every private/context seed.

checks.name: regional_context_not_evidence
checks.detail: Country/keyword monitoring lands only as ThreatSource context.

checks.name: engine_eval_pass
checks.detail: Current synthetic engine evaluation reports pass=true.

checks.name: active_on_top_invariant
checks.detail: Active compromise candidates rank strictly above non-active suppliers.

checks.name: active_detection_clean
checks.detail: Synthetic active-compromise evaluation has no false positives or false negatives.

limitations: Evaluation uses a synthetic clean mock corpus; it proves wiring, not field precision.
Private feed query seeds are not executed by this check.
Live compromise confirmation still requires VPN/SSO/IAM/EDR or supplier response evidence.
